title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXIII. Natural History.
content:
The Cock. Lock the dairy door,
                                Lock the dairy door!
        The Hen.    Chickle, chackle, chee,
                                I haven't got the key!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXIII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
